title: Yijing Hexagram 31: Xian (Influence)
description: Hexagram 31 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 31 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Influence. Success. Perseverance furthers. To take a maiden to wife brings good fortune.
